CONDITION_CATEGORY_07 
LABEL: 
Special Needs Plan (SNP) — Condition Category 07 (Diabetes) 
DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies special needs plans (SNP) for diabetes mellitus (Condition Category 07). 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
CMS (HPMS files) 
VALUES: 
N = Not a SNP for this Condition Category 
Y = SNP for this Condition Category 
COMMENT: 
The CCW constructs
